setup: RALPH_WORKER_ID=3, RALPH_TASK_ID=5
assertions: Worker directories use worker-3/ not worker-1/

setup: RALPH_TASK_ID=5, tasks.json with task 5 details
assertions: Does NOT scan for claimable tasks

setup: Git repo, task with isolated: true
assertions: Runs git worktree add with correct branch name
CDs into worktree directory for implementation

setup: Other workers have PROGRESS.md with learnings
assertions: Reads other workers' PROGRESS.md for learnings
Applies learnings as constraints before implementing

setup: PROGRESS.md with learnings from previous generations
assertions: Reads PROGRESS.md before writing any code
Does NOT repeat approaches marked as failed in learnings

setup: Assigned non-UI task
assertions: Writes test file BEFORE implementation file

setup: state.json with consecutive_failures: 2, test about to fail again
assertions: Sends [FAIL] curl POST to http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload with task_id, worker_id, error summary, and consecutive_failures
Does NOT continue implementing or invoke /ralph-kage-bunshin-debug directly

setup: state.json with last_results: ['fail', 'pass', 'fail', 'pass']
assertions: Sends [PATHOLOGY] curl POST to http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload with task_id, worker_id, type:'oscillation'

setup: Last 3 results are all 'fail:external_service'
assertions: Tries approaches in order: direct → proxy → mock fallback
Does NOT jump to mock immediately

setup: All implementation done, dod_checklist partially true
assertions: Runs npm test fresh (not trusting previous pass)

setup: All DoD criteria VERIFIED
assertions: Sends [DONE] curl POST to http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload with task_id and worker_id
Does NOT write converged:true to state.json or tasks.json

setup: Assigned UI task with browser interaction
assertions: Writes E2E test before unit tests
Confirms E2E test fails (red) before implementing

setup: Task description contains '/ui-reverse-engineering'
assertions: Invokes the skill BEFORE writing implementation code

setup: End of a generation
assertions: Contains task:, result:, next:, used_skills:, learnings: fields
learnings: is never omitted (uses 'none' if nothing learned)

setup: Generation completed with test pass
assertions: last_results appended with 'pass', kept to max 5
updated_at set to current ISO timestamp

setup: RALPH_PROJECT_DIR=/tmp/project
isolated:true task, no .git directory
assertions: Logs 'worktree skipped: not a git repo' in PROGRESS.md

setup: Task depends_on:[1], task 1 converged but package.json missing
CLAUDE.md with Code Correctness Rules, SPEC.md with tech stack
assertions: Respects Code Correctness Rules in implementation

setup: No state.json exists for this worker
assertions: Creates state.json with all required fields (worker_id, task, generation:0, consecutive_failures:0, last_results:[], pathology, approach_history, dod_checklist, converged:false, timestamps)

setup: Task involves using an animation library
assertions: Reads library implementation before writing code that calls it
Does NOT assume behavior from API name alone

setup: UI task with multiple visual changes needed
assertions: Applies one change, checks browser, then applies next
Does NOT batch multiple visual changes

setup: Task description mentions 'fetch from https://api.example.com'
E2E test fails after implementation code written
Discovers proxy config that requires restart
assertions: Records the discovery in PROGRESS.md under learnings: immediately
Does NOT wait until convergence to record it
Broadcasts to watcher via curl POST if it affects other workers

setup: npm test run
Same approach fails for 2nd consecutive time
UI task, tests pass
assertions: Measures actual animation duration (no arbitrary sleep)
Checks for white flash/layout jump/blank frame

setup: UI task with CSS
assertions: Runs grep for CSS imports in entry files

setup: approach_history has same goal 3 times
Any pathology detected
assertions: (2) Sends [PATHOLOGY] curl POST to http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload with task_id, worker_id, and pathology type

setup: package.json has test:e2e script
assertions: Detects and runs the E2E script

setup: UI task with Playwright tests
SPEC.md has 3 E2E scenarios for this task
assertions: Marks each as COVERED or MISSING
Does NOT report [DONE] if any MISSING

setup: Task description has '/ui-reverse-engineering', PROGRESS.md used_skills doesn't include it
assertions: Goes back and runs the skill

setup: Failing test
Task says 'add login form', obvious opportunity to add OAuth
Isolated task done, git remote exists, RALPH_AUTO_PUSH=true in .ralph/.env
Isolated task done, git remote exists, RALPH_AUTO_PUSH not set
assertions: Logs 'push skipped — set RALPH_AUTO_PUSH=true' in PROGRESS.md
Still removes worktree and cleans up

setup: Worker needs to report status to watcher
assertions: Sends [DONE]/[FAIL]/[PATHOLOGY] via curl POST to http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload
Uses port 8787 (not a different port) for all watcher communication

setup: state.json contains debug_session with API key in error output
assertions: Uses read-modify-write pattern (updates only needed fields)
Does NOT echo full state.json content in output

setup: Task description has '/ui-reverse-engineering', PROGRESS.md has used_skills entry, but no ui-measurements.json file exists
assertions: Does NOT report [DONE] — goes back to invoke the skill and produce the artifact
After re-running, writes ui-measurements.json with actual measurement data
Sets dod_checklist.skill_artifacts to true only after artifact file exists

setup: Task description has '/transition-reverse-engineering', no transition-measurements.json exists
assertions: Does NOT report [DONE] — blocks until artifact exists with real data
Sets dod_checklist.skill_artifacts to true only after file exists

setup: SPEC.md has ## Reference URL, UI task, /ui-capture skill available
assertions: Reads per-section verdicts from ui-capture output
Writes visual-regression.json with per-section verdicts and overall_verdict
Does NOT report [DONE] if overall_verdict is 'fail'

setup: visual-regression.json exists with overall_verdict:'fail', section 'hero' mismatched
assertions: Goes back to fix mismatches before re-running visual regression

setup: SPEC.md has ## Reference URL, UI task, /ui-capture skill NOT installed
assertions: Documents that /ui-capture is unavailable in PROGRESS.md
Does NOT fail or block [DONE] for this reason alone
Sets dod_checklist.visual_regression to false with documented skip reason

setup: ui-measurements.json exists but contains {} or placeholder data
assertions: Does NOT accept it as valid
Goes back to re-invoke the skill and produce real measurements

setup: All approaches exhausted, task cannot be completed
assertions: Sends [FAIL] curl POST to http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload with task_id, worker_id, error summary, and consecutive_failures

setup: state.json has debug_session.proposed_fix with a specific file and change
assertions: Reads debug_session.proposed_fix before writing any code
Applies the proposed fix as the FIRST action of this generation
Does NOT skip or ignore the proposed fix
Records debug fix applied in PROGRESS.md

setup: state.json has architect_review.status: 'rejected' with notes listing 2 gaps
assertions: Addresses each gap listed in notes
Does NOT re-implement from scratch — only fixes the listed gaps
Records gaps being fixed in PROGRESS.md

setup: Worker discovers that the API endpoint documented in SPEC.md is wrong (returns 404)
assertions: Immediately sends [BROADCAST] curl POST to watcher at :8787
Message includes worker ID and one-line summary of the discovery
Does NOT wait until convergence to share the discovery
Records broadcast sent in PROGRESS.md under learnings:

setup: Isolated task done, no git remote configured, RALPH_AUTO_PUSH=true
assertions: Merges worktree branch into base branch instead of pushing
Logs 'merged into base branch — no remote available' in PROGRESS.md
